title: Youtube Poop- Mama Luigi Kills the King!
description:
DUH EPIK BADLE BETWEN THE KING AND MAMA LUIGI ENDS IN  TRAGD :( MAMA LUIGI KILLD THE KING AND HE DEAD DIE ON THE FLUR. RIP KING BECAUSE U R DIED ;(

jesus this took long enough to make. Now if you'll excuse me, I'm going to work on something else now... something... shorter and less time consuming... Geez.

It's a little late for my anniversary, but this is my anniversary video. As of Feburary 10, 2011, I've been doing this BS for 3 years of my silly little life.
